defs: Not conscionable; exceeding the limits of any reasonable claim or expectation; not conforming to reason; unreasonable; inordinate; extravagant; as, an unconscionable person or demand; unconscionable size.
quotes: Which use of reason, most reasonless and unconscionable, is the utmost that any tyrant ever pretended.
His giantship is gone somewhat crestfallen, Stalking with less unconscionable strides.

defs: Not guided by, or conformed to, conscience; that cannot be done in good conscience; as, unconscionable profits.
quotes: Ungenerous as well as unconscionable practices.
